title: diospyros lanceifolia var. lanceifolia
intro: Diospyros lanceifolia var. lanceifolia, also known as the lance-leaf persimmon, is a deciduous shrub or small tree species in the Ebenaceae family, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Diospyros lanceifolia var. lanceifolia include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea and infusion, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
